module.name: src
module.purpose: Second-generation Rust source organized into client, agent, and common modules with deployable typed configuration, config-gated common logging with direct warning/error shortcuts, optional core settings, agent-owned bind address settings, an interactive streaming CLI interface, a minimal agent binary main entrypoint that loads configuration and serves accepted clients, marker-free binary main entry files, directional chat request/response envelopes and segments, centralized external-library namespaces, remoc-backed session/task endpoints, explicit public/private Rust section markers where private shared implementation details exist, and a first minimal single-request loop-engine runtime whose engine-owned task contexts store direct shared task/status/runtime-event fields.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client-facing draft split into an interactive streaming CLI binary/interface with a marker-free main entry, mod.rs-only module wiring, and a remoc-backed core client session endpoint with streamed response segment receives.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent public surface for a minimal loop engine runtime with direct task-context state fields, remoc-backed frontdoor session/task endpoints, streamed chat response segments, model backend selection, model backend implementations, and a marker-free minimal agent binary main entrypoint that reads bind address from agent config and serves accepted clients.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared interfaces used across the second-generation source tree, including deployable typed TOML configuration with optional core settings, agent-owned bind address settings, config-gated common logging with direct warning/error shortcuts, fallible loading, directional chat request messages and response segments, shared channel errors, remoc session protocol messages, and centralized crate-local external-library namespaces.
